disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Your Renewal: 2018 Membership |

| | | | | | | |

Friend,

Now that we are officially in 2018, President Trump has requested a list of all supporters who have renewed their 2018 Membership by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.

These are the patriots who are laying the early foundation for an even stronger second year of our historic presidency. These are the patriots who refuse to let the media define our movement.

And this is your chance to put your name up top, Friend.

**[Please make a contribution of $1 to renew your 2018 Sustaining Membership before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show the President he has the FULL backing of the American people in the new year.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5688a3d213bad7dba55a7c680901c75b1f13ff732b1a52afeed78fb96647437122c530200ec8c72c7d34cf2a1e1f02ae5de0b4e5f5719a5c)**

**STATUS:** **PENDING**

The media is hoping to claim that 2018 will be a referendum on President Trump.

It's up to us to prove them WRONG. Let's show them that we are starting off the year stronger than we started his inauguration.

America is waking up to the fake news. We're waking up to the lies liberals have been feeding our country for decades. We are still fighting to take our country, and we will not rest.

**[Please renew your 2018 Sustaining Membership for $1, and let's prove that President Trump has the FULL backing of the American people.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5688a3d213bad7dbad08516c371ec464ec5b649e8fe68ac735cfcf1eb72e9ccb78980c525bfafdbc2c17fee32d52f7d917b395abe7422ccf)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A letter to my friend Ralph
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
As I watched my friend Ralph Northam be sworn into office as Governor of Virginia yesterday, I found myself reflecting on my own time as Governor, lessons learned, and hopes for the future of our great Commonwealth.

Only 73 people have served as Governor since Virginia went from colony to Commonwealth, and I'm honored to be one of them. From my own experience, and from that of my colleagues who have served (and my political hero, my father-in-law Lin Holton), I can say that leading the people of Virginia is incredibly rewarding, challenging, and meaningful. The responsibility on Ralph's shoulders is great: Our state has its scars, and certainly faces -- like the rest of the country -- our fair share of divisions and obstacles in our path forward. But I firmly believe that the people of Virginia are committed to moving forward. (Just look at the election results from November, from Ralph all the way down to the *fifteen* seats flipped in the House of Delegates.)

**So today, I'm so happy to wish Ralph well in his next four years in Richmond. I know that he -- along with Justin Fairfax and Mark Herring -- is going to do great things.** [**I hope you'll add your name to mine to congratulate him on his official inauguration to the Office of Governor, and to say you're ready for an even brighter future in our Commonwealth.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nXhs%2FUkOksscd6F9uleTsT0s8Qlxe8Cm)

You know, from signing on to Twitter or watching cable news, it's easy to feel like our country is more divided than ever, and it's true that we're living in a polarizing political environment these days. But when you take a look around at the real people next to you, I often find that we're less different than the so-called internet "trolls" would have us think. I kicked off 2018 by traveling around rural Virginia, from Farmville to Galax to Abingdon (and a few more stops in-between), and I was incredibly heartened by the folks I met and the friends I made. When I was running on the ticket in 2016, we said we were "stronger together" -- and even as we get further away from that experience, I find the phrase to hold true.

**I do believe we are stronger together, and I believe in a Virginia for all -- no matter what region you live in, the color of your skin, where you worship, who you love, or how you identify. I know that Ralph does too, and today I am thrilled to be able to celebrate those beliefs with him.** [**Add your name to celebrate with us.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iPI1BA3kFOMzxFwzTAYApj0s8Qlxe8Cm)

Thank you,

Tim Kaine

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GxtpBLgqLRxYRYvLZsSx3j0s8Qlxe8Cm)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HXUwKHCW%2B1jRgasux%2F9WMj0s8Qlxe8Cm).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: staff@fladems.com
subject: The GOP wants to hide this failure:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Team -- Don't let the GOP hide their failure to reauthorize CHIP.

Putting the health of Florida's children in political limbo is shameful and unacceptable.

[**SIGN ON: Demand immediate funding for CHIP to protect children 's healthcare! >>>**](http://act.floridadems. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/fundchipnow/?code=FD&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ffdp-chip%3Frefcode%3DFDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue&firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+ON+Demand+immediate+funding+for+CHI&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2")

**Begin forwarded message:**
>
> Friend,
>
> Congressional Republicans are putting more than 374,000 Florida children at risk.
>
> **Instead of doing the right thing at the end of last year and reauthorizing funding for the Children 's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), Republicans allowed it to expire.**
>
> [**Demand Congress stop playing partisan games with the lives of nine million American children. Sign on here to demand immediate funding for CHIP >>>**](http://act.floridadems. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/fundchipnow/?code=FD&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ffdp-chip%3Frefcode%3DFDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue&firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Demand+Congress+stop+playing+partisan+ga&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2")
>
> Millions of working families count on CHIP to provide health care for their children, whether it's for regular checkups or emergency services.
>
> In Florida, CHIP funds the 'Florida KidCare' program, which provides high-quality, low-cost health insurance for children from birth to 18 across Florida.
>
> But now, thanks to Republican inaction, funding is running out.
>
> [**Demand Congress immediately pass funding for CHIP. Add your name here >>>**](http://act.floridadems. "https://petitions.signforgood.com/fundchipnow/?code=FD&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ffdp-chip%3Frefcode%3DFDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue&firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Demand+Congress+immediately+pass+funding&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2")
>
> Health coverage for nearly nine million children across America is hanging in the balance, while Republicans continue to drag their feet.
>
> Thanks,
>
> Florida Democrats

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bf23/1a5213b3/727fbfd2/718b0fb7/368622493/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180112_1_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Much of the media attention this past week has focused on the
President's absurd and hate-filled comments about other nations
around the world. These comments were disheartening and deserve
to be condemned.

Peter, much of the media
attention this past week has focused on the President's absurd
and hate-filled comments about other nations around the world.
These comments were disheartening and deserve to be condemned.

At the same time, there is a
looming deadline to find a DACA fix that threatens hundreds of
thousands of families.

Roughly 800,000 young adults were
brought to this country as little children and are threatened
with deportation to countries that will be foreign to them, and
in many instances, they will be sent to war-torn nations where
they will face very real dangers.

These are real people with real
families whose lives are rooted here. They've been positively
contributing to America - their home.

The America I know has compassion
for these families. The Republican Party is better than the
President's recent comments. We must DEMAND reasonable,
common-sense and compassionate action from our elected leaders in
Washington.

Below is a recap of our recent
activities on this issue. I'd really appreciate it if you'd
consider sharing these items to get this message out.

Thank you.

-John

-- Team Kasich Update --

Gov. Kasich co-authored an op-ed
with Jeb Bush, Jr. that ran in the New York Times:

NYT Op-Ed: A Bad Idea on
Immigration (read here)

Gov. Kasich issued statements on
social media about the President's remarks and shared clips from
his TV interviews. These were widely covered by the news media
and political influencers:

*Note: If you'd prefer to share
the Facebook versions of these videos, please find them at:
Facebook.com/JohnKasich

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to chip in to
support Gov. Kasich's message, please consider making a generous
donation at: JohnKasich.com/Donate

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
